reason_summary: Revenue/subscription growth is strong, but Armis acquisition pressures operating margin and FCF margin; portfolio overlap with tech/software factor deducted.
Automotive/IoT and data-center custom silicon help the thesis, but handset revenue pressure and heavy existing semiconductor exposure keep it in reserve.
AI cloud and RPO narrative are strong, but negative FCF, very large FY2027 CapEx, and debt/equity financing needs trigger the objective financial blocker.
Backtest is excellent and power-grid/data-center demand is plausible, but latest official quarter and FCF/margin details still need confirmation before upgrade.
Revenue/profit remain supported by Dupixent, but Eylea pressure, product concentration, patent/pipeline/FDA risks keep it in reserve.
